# MDMX

> A git-native CMS toolkit for Next.js built on "MDMX": a strict, round-trippable
> subset of MDX where the user's own React components are first-class blocks in a
> Notion-style editor. Content is committed to the user's GitHub repo; a codegen
> step turns their components into a typed registry that drives validation, the
> editor palette, and prop panels. TypeScript, npm-workspaces monorepo, ESM.

Key invariants: canonical byte-stable serialization (changes are semver-major);
component props must be JSON literals; out-of-subset content is preserved
byte-for-byte via raw blocks; editing one prop changes one line of output.

Agents: documentation is part of "done". After each session, follow the
wiki-upkeep checklist in AGENTS.md (append SessionLog, record ADRs, sync wiki).

## Docs

- [SPEC.md](SPEC.md): normative MDMX v1 grammar, canonical form, registry schema, diagnostics, provider contract
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): agent operating guide — architecture map, commands, invariants, wiki-upkeep rule
- [claude-code-handoff.md](agent-context/claude-code-handoff.md): start-here briefing for a Claude Code session
- [docs/DECISIONS.md](docs/DECISIONS.md): Architecture Decision Record (ADR log)
- [docs/wiki/Home.md](docs/wiki/Home.md): the documentation hub
- [README.md](README.md): overview, package status, roadmap

## Wiki

- [Architecture](docs/wiki/Architecture.md): the pipeline and how packages connect
- [Packages](docs/wiki/Packages.md): per-package reference and test counts
- [Invariants](docs/wiki/Invariants.md): the nine rules that must not break
- [Glossary](docs/wiki/Glossary.md): MDMX, registry, control, children policy, …
- [Roadmap](docs/wiki/Roadmap.md): done / in-progress / next, by phase
- [TwoColumn](docs/wiki/TwoColumn.md): the nested-editing implementation plan
- [Testing](docs/wiki/Testing.md): suite organization and load-bearing guarantees
- [SessionLog](docs/wiki/SessionLog.md): chronological change history

## Packages

- [packages/core](packages/core): parser, validator (MDMX001–007), canonical serializer, Registry, defineMDMX, ContentProvider contract
- [packages/cli](packages/cli): `mdmx generate` (TS type extraction → registry codegen), `mdmx check` (content lint)
- [packages/editor](packages/editor): registry→ProseMirror schema, mdast⇄ProseMirror converters, command/palette layer (React UI pending)
- [packages/next](packages/next): LocalProvider, content readers, sessions, GitHub OAuth, API handlers (mount page pending)
- [packages/provider-github](packages/provider-github): atomic multi-file commits via the GitHub Git Data API with conflict detection

## Examples

- [examples/demo](examples/demo): minimal consumer project; run `node ../../packages/cli/dist/bin.js generate` inside it
- [examples/editor-prototype.html](examples/editor-prototype.html): interactive editor UI spec (self-contained React artifact)
